scenario.title: TC_009_UOP_001 UOP Tasks list mass action
scenario.step: And [Input] I login as 'p:UOPuser.audit1' with password 'p:password'
And [Input] I click on 'Tasks List Count'
And [Input] Set 'Tasks List Grid Size' value to 'p:GeneralizationSizePage'
And [Input] I click on 'Change Grid Size Button'
And [Action] I get value from 'Tasks List Grid Size' and save it as 'TasksListBeforeClose'
And [Assertion] Verify Random Checkbox Selection and Mass Action in Grid
